title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers and automates workflows by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. Available exclusively in Claude Pro and Max plans, it supports task scheduling, email summarization, calendar integration, and file organization.
